title: Member can create team invitations
description: Membership is checked but the administrator role is omitted.
requirement: REQ-AUTH-1: Only team administrators may create invitations.
seededViolation: The POST route permits any team member to create an invitation.
whyItMatters: Regular members can expand a team without authorization.

expectedFindings.title: Invitation creation does not require an administrator
expectedFindings.description: A regular member can create an invitation because membership is checked without validating the admin role.

distractors.description: The route uses a generic unauthorized error.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: A non-enumerating error message is intentional.
